project_name: Ethical Edge Open GRC - Gates Foundation AI Pilot

ai_development_integration.description: Development of RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) agents to parse NGO financial reports and audit logs against King V and local SADC regulatory frameworks.
milestones: Transition from static JSON checklists to dynamic AI-driven compliance verification.
Integration of LLM APIs for automated gap analysis in charitable financial reporting.

pilot_testing_validation.description: On-the-ground validation with 5-10 selected NGOs in Botswana and the SADC region to test GRC logic in real-world cross-border giving scenarios.
milestones: Identify and onboard regional NGO partners.
User Acceptance Testing (UAT) for the 'Donor Confidence' dashboard.

data_infrastructure_standards.description: Establishing open-standard data pipelines to ensure LMIC nonprofit compliance data is interoperable with global donor AI discovery tools.
milestones: Finalization of the Open GRC schema (PostgreSQL).

responsible_ai_governance.description: Bias auditing and privacy-preserving measures to ensure compliance with the Botswana Data Protection Act (BDPA) and GDPR.
milestones: AI Ethics audit and mitigation of regional data biases.
Implementation of zero-knowledge proof concepts for sensitive NGO data.

operational_indirect_costs.description: Administrative oversight, legal review of cross-border compliance logic, and project management.
milestones: Final project impact report for Gates Foundation.

impact_metrics: Reduction in time-to-compliance for cross-border donations.
Increase in donor 'Trust Score' for participating SADC NGOs.
Portability of GRC data across international giving platforms.
